ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the district */,
  "land_area" REAL /* Land area of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data entry */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "american_indian" INTEGER /* Number of American Indians */,
  "white" INTEGER /* Number of Whites */,
  "asian" INTEGER /* Number of Asians */,
  "black" INTEGER /* Number of Blacks */,
  "two_or_more" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with two or more ethnicities */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Number of individuals with other ethnicities */,
  "pacific_islander" INTEGER /* Number of Pacific Islanders */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the district population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the district population */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the district population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "american_indian_data" (
  "american_indian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each American Indian data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "american_indian_pct" REAL /* Percentage of American Indians in the district */,
  "american_indian_median_age" REAL /* Median age of American Indians in the district */,
  "american_indian_median_income" REAL /* Median income of American Indians in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("american_indian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_american_indian_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "white_data" (
  "white_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each White data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "white_pct" REAL /* Percentage of Whites in the district */,
  "white_median_age" REAL /* Median age of Whites in the district */,
  "white_median_income" REAL /* Median income of Whites in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("white_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_white_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asian_data" (
  "asian_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Asian data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "asian_pct" REAL /* Percentage of Asians in the district */,
  "asian_median_age" REAL /* Median age of Asians in the district */,
  "asian_median_income" REAL /* Median income of Asians in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asian_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_asian_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "black_data" (
  "black_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Black data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "black_pct" REAL /* Percentage of Blacks in the district */,
  "black_median_age" REAL /* Median age of Blacks in the district */,
  "black_median_income" REAL /* Median income of Blacks in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("black_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_black_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "two_or_more_data" (
  "two_or_more_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each two or more ethnicities data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "two_or_more_pct" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with two or more ethnicities in the district */,
  "two_or_more_median_age" REAL /* Median age of individuals with two or more ethnicities in the district */,
  "two_or_more_median_income" REAL /* Median income of individuals with two or more ethnicities in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("two_or_more_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_two_or_more_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "other_data" (
  "other_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each other ethnicities data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "other_pct" REAL /* Percentage of individuals with other ethnicities in the district */,
  "other_median_age" REAL /* Median age of individuals with other ethnicities in the district */,
  "other_median_income" REAL /* Median income of individuals with other ethnicities in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("other_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_other_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pacific_islander_data" (
  "pacific_islander_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pacific Islander data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the demographic data entry */,
  "pacific_islander_pct" REAL /* Percentage of Pacific Islanders in the district */,
  "pacific_islander_median_age" REAL /* Median age of Pacific Islanders in the district */,
  "pacific_islander_median_income" REAL /* Median income of Pacific Islanders in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pacific_islander_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pacific_islander_data_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the demographic data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the demographic data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "visualization_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic data used in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., demographic trends, population growth) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES demographic_data ("data_id")
)
